mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS hotDealId, p.id AS productId, hp.product_option_id AS productOptionId, h.title AS hotDealTitle, p.name AS productName, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, hp.original_price AS originalPrice, hp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / hp.original_price * 100) AS discountRate, po.stock AS stock, h.ends_at AS endsAt, GREATEST(0, FLOOR((CAST(h.ends_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE) * 86400)) AS remainingSeconds FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at AND po.stock > 0 ORDER BY h.ends_at, h.id, hp.product_option_id

SELECT h.id, h.title, h.starts_at AS startsAt, h.ends_at AS endsAt, GREATEST(0, FLOOR((CAST(h.ends_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE) * 86400)) AS remainingSeconds, ( SELECT pp.picture_saved_location FROM hot_deal_products hp JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.product_id = po.product_id WHERE hp.hot_deal_id = h.id ORDER BY po.product_id ASC, pp.display_order ASC, pp.id ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS heroImageLocation FROM hot_deals h WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at ORDER BY h.ends_at ASC, h.id ASC

SELECT h.id AS hotDealId, h.title AS hotDealTitle, p.id AS productId, hp.product_option_id AS productOptionId, p.name AS productName, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, hp.original_price AS originalPrice, hp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / hp.original_price * 100) AS discountRate, po.stock AS stock, p.view_count AS viewCount, NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) AS totalQuantity, h.ends_at AS endsAt, GREATEST(0, FLOOR((CAST(h.ends_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE) * 86400)) AS remainingSeconds, CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_option_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM purchase_product_options GROUP BY product_option_id ) purchase_stat ON purchase_stat.product_option_id = hp.product_option_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) favorite_stat ON favorite_stat.product_id = p.id WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at AND po.stock > 0
AND h.id = #{hotDealId}
ORDER BY hp.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price ASC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.id ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
